use_cases: User profile action buttons in navigation bars or headers
Follow, message, or connect actions in social contexts
User attribution displays on content items
Quick action buttons with user context in dashboards
ai_summary: A composite avatar-labeled button component combining Avatar and Button primitives for user action interfaces. Supports sm/md/lg sizing variants and passes standard button HTML attributes. Features a clean minimalist aesthetic with rounded-full styling and primary color theming, suitable for desktop and mobile platforms.
